title: InstCombine: Fold known-qnan results to a literal nan
author: arsenm
description:
Previously we only considered fcNan to fold to qnan for canonicalizing
results, ignoring the simpler case where we know the nan is already
quiet.

comments.author: arsenm
comments.body:
* **#176123** 👈 (View in Graphite) * **#176122** * **#176121** * `main`

This stack of pull requests is managed by Graphite. Learn more about stacking.

comments.author: arsenm
comments.body: This also needs to check for canonicalizing
